---

> [!important]
> When you notice a bug during a playthrough (e.g. AI cannot proceed with the game), **pause the agent, save and quit in-game, and upload your run file.** This will *dramatically* speed up our development process 🙏.
> To upload you run file, go to `%APPDATA%/SlayTheSpire2/steam`, click on your steam ID, then `modded`. Zip/7z/tar the profile where you spot the bug. You can check the top-left corner from the in-game menu for the profile ID.
> You may remove these instructions as you wish.
---

**Version**
Game version: [e.g. 0.99.1]
Mod version: [e.g. 0.3.2, a390f1b]

**Description**
Concisely summarize the issue you've encountered.

**MCP Client**
N/A (Raw API calls or does not matter) / Claude Desktop / Cursor / GPT-5.4 via OpenCode / ...
